creator: Rebecca Bellan
title: (No AI) A ‘pound of flesh’ from data centers: one senator’s answer to AI job losses
dc:creator: Rebecca Bellan
content: Fears of AI-driven job loss are growing fast, and they’re fueling backlash against data centers. Sen. Mark Warner suggests taxing them to help workers survive the transition.
contentSnippet: Fears of AI-driven job loss are growing fast, and they’re fueling backlash against data centers. Sen. Mark Warner suggests taxing them to help workers survive the transition.

creator: Ivan Mehta
title: (No AI) Mistral releases a new open-source model for speech generation

content: Mistral's new speech model can run on a smartwatch or a smartphone.

title: (No AI) Webtoon is adding AI localization tools to its comics platform
author: Charles Pulliam-Moore
content:
![The Webtoon logo on a white background.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/03/Screenshot-2026-03-23-at-4.06.41%E2%80%AFPM.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=12.468125915527,0,73.526875305176,100)

Canvas, [Webtoon](https://www.theverge.com/streaming/778471/disney-webtoon-comics-marvel-starwars)'s platform for user-uploaded comics, is about to get a major overhaul that's designed to help creators make more money and share their art with a wider audience.

Today, Webtoon announced its plans to roll out a number of new features for Canvas that will make it easier for artists to build global followings and gain a deeper understanding of who's engaging with their work. Soon, manga creators who upload their work to Canvas will be able to use an AI-powered translation tool to localize their scripts into English, Spanish, French, Indonesian, Thai, Traditional Chinese, and German. A beta version of the translation feature - …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/899108/webtoon-canvas-ai-translation-localization-yongsoo-kim)

Soon, manga creators who upload their work to Canvas will be able to use an AI-powered translation tool to localize their scripts into English, Spanish, French, Indonesian, Thai, Traditional Chinese, and German. A beta version of the translation feature  - …

Today, Webtoon announced its plans to roll out a number of new features for Canvas that will make it easier for artists to build global followings […]

title: (No AI) EU backs nude app ban and delays to landmark AI rules
author: Robert Hart
content:
![](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/03/STK450_EU_E.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

European lawmakers have [voted](https://www.europarl.europa.eu/news/en/press-room/20260323IPR38829/artificial-intelligence-act-delayed-application-ban-on-nudifier-apps) to delay key parts of the EU AI Act, the bloc's flagship law for regulating artificial intelligence, while also backing proposals to ban nudify apps.

The measures, approved by a large majority in the European Parliament, would push back compliance deadlines for developers of high-risk AI systems - those deemed to pose a "serious risk" to health, safety, or fundamental rights - until December 2027. Companies developing AI systems covered by sector-specific safety rules like toys or medical devices would have even longer to comply, with a proposed deadline of August 2028. Rules requiring providers to watermark A …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/901315/eu-ai-act-delays-ban-nudify-apps)

Companies developing AI systems covered by sector-specific safety rules like toys or medical devices would have even longer to comply, with a proposed deadline of August 2028. Rules requiring providers to watermark A …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: (No AI) Inside our approach to the Model Spec
content: Learn how OpenAI’s Model Spec serves as a public framework for model behavior, balancing safety, user freedom, and accountability as AI systems advance.
contentSnippet: Learn how OpenAI’s Model Spec serves as a public framework for model behavior, balancing safety, user freedom, and accountability as AI systems advance.

title: (No AI) Introducing the OpenAI Safety Bug Bounty program
content: OpenAI launches a Safety Bug Bounty program to identify AI abuse and safety risks, including agentic vulnerabilities, prompt injection, and data exfiltration.
contentSnippet: OpenAI launches a Safety Bug Bounty program to identify AI abuse and safety risks, including agentic vulnerabilities, prompt injection, and data exfiltration.

title: (No AI) Protecting people from harmful manipulation
content: Google DeepMind researches AI's harmful manipulation risks across areas like finance and health, leading to new safety measures.
contentSnippet: Google DeepMind researches AI's harmful manipulation risks across areas like finance and health, leading to new safety measures.

title: (No AI) Lyria 3 Pro: Create longer tracks in more
content: Introducing Lyria 3 Pro, which unlocks longer tracks with structural awareness. We’re also bringing Lyria to more Google products and surfaces.
contentSnippet: Introducing Lyria 3 Pro, which unlocks longer tracks with structural awareness. We’re also bringing Lyria to more Google products and surfaces.

creator: Molly Taft
title: (No AI) Senators Demand to Know How Much Energy Data Centers Use
dc:creator: Molly Taft
content: In a letter sent Thursday morning, Elizabeth Warren and Josh Hawley press the Energy Information Agency to mandate annual electricity disclosure for data centers.
contentSnippet: In a letter sent Thursday morning, Elizabeth Warren and Josh Hawley press the Energy Information Agency to mandate annual electricity disclosure for data centers.

creator: Jason Parham
title: (No AI) ‘She’s Never Going to Age’: Porn Stars Are Embracing AI Clones to Stay Forever Young
dc:creator: Jason Parham
content: AI companion platforms like OhChat and SinfulX are offering adult creators digital twins, who are always at their peak and stay monetizing.
contentSnippet: AI companion platforms like OhChat and SinfulX are offering adult creators digital twins, who are always at their peak and stay monetizing.
